untranslatable_reason: Signal requires precise Double Tops pattern detection (two peaks at similar levels with valley between) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. Requires custom pattern recognition logic. Additionally, market regime determination (bull vs bear based on yearly highs/lows) and pullback confirmation metrics (61%/48% frequencies) are not translatable to standard indicator conditions.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation: Used price_pos_20 (position within 20-bar range) as proxy for proximity to yearly levels in trending markets. Entry_short conditions approximate formation near support/resistance. Exit uses reversal above prior high as proxy for pattern failure. The core Double Tops pattern mechanics require custom detection not available in indicator library.
